global.description: The ad features a vibrant design promoting the game VoxelRealm with engaging gameplay elements.
global.main_message: Join VoxelRealm for free rewards and exciting gameplay.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: VoxelRealm logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'VoxelRealm' in bold, vibrant colors at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Join the arena text
elements.description: A clear, inviting text that reads 'Join the arena' in a prominent font, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Free rewards text
elements.description: A smaller text below the main body text that states 'Free rewards for new players', conveying an enticing offer.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A bold button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Watch now', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Gameplay preview
elements.description: A visual representation of gameplay elements, showcasing interactive features of the game.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Geometric shapes in the background that add depth and interest to the overall design.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: An unspecified element that appears in the top right corner, possibly decorative or functional.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: A small circular element positioned towards the bottom center, likely part of the gameplay interface.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: Another small circular element located near the bottom left, contributing to the gameplay interface.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: A small element at the top center, possibly a decorative feature or part of the interface.

elements.description: A small element positioned centrally, likely part of the gameplay interface.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline text 'VoxelRealm' prominently displayed at the top, capturing attention.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: A clear and inviting message that encourages players to join the game, located centrally.
elements.text_content: Join the arena Free rewards for new players

elements.label: Watch now text
elements.description: A call-to-action text 'Watch now' at the bottom, designed to prompt user engagement.
